'''Iritsa''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Chazwa/Legends|Chazwa]].

==Buildings==
Iritsa was composed of a [[warehouse district]], a [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]], and two markets ([[North Market|north]] and [[South Market|south]], respectively). Situated between the two markets was [[Gold Plaza]], while a living compound, known as [[the Stones]], was located due south of them.

{{City-stub}}
